The '''Navigators' Guild''' was a guild located in the [[Unknown Regions]] of [[the galaxy]] that sent [[navigator]]s to those who hired them. [[Void Guides]], [[Pathfinders (Navigators' Guild)|Pathfinders]], and [[Vector One]] were groups employed by the Guild.<ref name="Chaos Rising" />

The Navigators of the Guild were bound by a strict code of neutrality and an even stricter code of confidentiality. They were forbidden from discussing the operations and locations of any one client with any other client. One such operation was the ability Pathfinders had of finding one another, which was a closely guarded secret among the guild.<ref name="Chaos Rising" />

Among the personnel of the Guild, the [[Chiss]] were reputed for arrogance and condescension toward other [[Sentience|sentient]] [[species]].<ref name="Chaos Rising" />

{{Company-stub}}
